_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MongoDB
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
MongoDB document database server egg.

MongoDB 8.2 is the latest stable release.
NoSQL document-oriented database using JSON-like BSON documents.

Default port: 27017.
Data is stored in /home/container/data.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# MongoDB Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y curl gnupg

curl -fsSL https://www.mongodb.org/static/pgp/server-8.0.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-8.0.gpg
echo "deb [ arch=amd64,arm64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-8.0.gpg ] https://repo.mongodb.org/apt/ubuntu jammy/mongodb-org/8.0 multiverse" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb-org-8.0.list

apt update && apt install -y mongodb-org

mkdir -p /mnt/server/data

echo "install complete"

variables.name: WiredTiger Cache Size (GB)
variables.description: Cache size in GB. Recommended: ~50% of available RAM. Minimum 0.25.

variables.name: Enable Auth
variables.description: Enable MongoDB authentication. Set to 1 to enable.
